project: Preset generique -- illustrations flat design modernes (version lite : palettes restreintes 4-6 couleurs)
language_convention: FR pour les meta-descriptions et notes d'usage, EN pour les tokens injectables dans les prompts IA

flexible: number of accent colors within 4-6 range
style_weight.usage: En cas de conflit entre regles, la priorite descend de critical vers flexible. Un pipeline peut sacrifier les flexible mais jamais les critical.

options.wide: full scene visible, environment context, multiple elements, used for process_flow and dashboard layouts
options.medium: subject with immediate context, balanced framing, used for hero_central and side_by_side
options.close: tight framing on subject, minimal environment, used for character showcase and icon details
options.icon: single object isolated, maximum simplification, used for icon_grid and logo

shot_type.usage: Injecter le shot_type apres le sujet et avant les style modifiers. Les layout_templates suggerent un shot_type par defaut mais il peut etre surcharge.

style.positioning: illustration vectorielle 2D premium, minimaliste, geometrique, sans profondeur realiste

linework: optional ultra-clean thin outlines for shape separation
clean geometric edges with soft corners
no sketch effect, no rough hand-drawn instability
color: bold solid color blocking with curated palette
no muddy colors, no excessive saturation conflict
white or light neutral background as default
shading: almost no shading, flat color blocking dominant
optional subtle ambient shadow for element separation only
no volumetric rendering, no dramatic lighting
no ambient occlusion, no cinematic shadows
shape_language: rounded geometric forms with soft corners
depth_rules: isometric allowed when functional clarity improves the composition
layering only for readability, not for cinematic depth
texture: no paper grain, brush grain, fabric grain, or noise overlays

hierarchy: secondary elements must support the main message
keep silhouette readability at thumbnail size
composition.density: minimal to moderate, maximum 5-6 meaningful elements per scene
balance: avoid tangents and shape mergers that reduce clarity
maintain clean edge spacing between major forms

avoid: skin pores and realistic anatomy detail
dark muddy colors and overrendered surfaces
lens effects, bokeh, and high-frequency micro-details
prompt_core: Modern flat design illustration, premium 2D vector-style artwork, minimalist geometric composition, clean shape language, simplified forms, bold solid color blocking, crisp contours, elegant negative space, highly readable layout, polished brand-illustration quality.
visual_signature: bold solid color blocking, zero gradient
rounded geometric silhouettes with soft corners
elegant negative space and visual calm

modifiers.usage: Les 5 core modifiers sont injectes apres le sujet. Les optional et enrichment modifiers ajoutent une nuance stylistique selon le contexte.

characters.design: simplified geometric figures, rounded forms, minimal facial detail, defined by shape silhouette and color
characters.anatomy: stylized proportions, intentionally simplified, elegant abstraction
characters.expressions: conveyed through simple geometric cues (head tilt, arm position, body lean) not facial micro-expressions
accessories: avoid tiny intricate props unless central to the message

rules: every element is a simplified geometric shape
isometric view acceptable as alternative to flat frontal
clean visual support with no environmental clutter
icons, furniture, plants, charts and objects must remain silhouette-simple

color_policy.dominant: white or very light neutral background
contrast_rules: preserve sufficient contrast between foreground and background
use accent color sparingly for focus
avoid adjacent tones with weak separation

negative_short: photorealistic, 3D render, cinematic lighting, heavy gradients, glossy materials, dramatic shadows, depth of field, film grain, sketch lines, cluttered background
negative_core: photorealistic, realistic texture, hyperrealism, 3D render, cinematic lighting, dramatic shadows, heavy gradients, glossy materials, reflections, metallic surfaces, skin pores, complex texture, visual noise, cluttered background, excessive detail, painterly brushstrokes, sketch lines, rough outlines, dark muddy colors, overrendered surfaces, depth-heavy perspective, volumetric fog, lens effects, bokeh, high-frequency micro-details, realistic perspective, ray tracing, subsurface scattering, rim light, depth of field, film grain, textured brushwork, noisy background, ornamental clutter, realistic muscles, detailed fingers, complex hair strands
negative_usage: negative_short (10 termes) pour Midjourney et moteurs avec limite de tokens. negative_core (35 termes) pour SDXL, Flux et moteurs sans contrainte de longueur.

prompt_examples.logo: [subject] logo, flat design, minimalistic, vector art, line art, iconic, [color palette]
prompt_examples.illustration_web: [scene with characters], flat design, minimalistic, vector art, clean shapes, iconic, [color palette]
prompt_examples.icon: [app icon subject], flat design, minimalistic, vector art, line art, iconic, [colors]
prompt_examples.poster: [poster subject], flat design, minimalistic, vector art, bold shapes, iconic, [color palette]
prompt_examples.character: [character description], flat design, minimalistic, vector art, rounded geometric silhouette, simplified proportions, [color palette]
prompt_examples.infographic: [data subject], flat design, minimalistic, vector art, clean modular layout, iconic, [color palette]

prompt_builder.template: [subject], [shot_type], [action or state], flat design, minimalistic, vector art, iconic, premium 2D illustration, [composition], [shape language], [palette], [background], [optional context]
prompt_builder.usage_note: Sujet en premier, puis action, puis contraintes de style et composition. Le prompt_builder structure l'assemblage du prompt final.

hero_central.description: central character or object, generous negative space, clean background
hero_central.composition: subject centered, minimum 40% empty space around, focal point clear and dominant

side_by_side.description: two elements facing each other, explainer layout, balanced symmetry
side_by_side.composition: two balanced halves, mirror or near-symmetry, visual conversation path from left to right

dashboard_infographic.description: modular grid layout, data cards, clean separation
dashboard_infographic.composition: grid-based 2x2 or 3x3, equal spacing, each module self-contained with clear boundary

process_flow.description: left-to-right or top-to-bottom sequential steps, connected by simple lines
process_flow.composition: clear linear progression, connecting lines or arrows between steps, numbered or visual hierarchy

icon_grid.description: regular grid of iconic elements, uniform sizing, consistent spacing
icon_grid.composition: equal-sized icons in uniform grid, consistent padding, monochromatic or limited color per row

user_collaborating.description: two simplified figures working together on a shared task
user_collaborating.scene_focus: shared workspace, high five, puzzle pieces fitting
user_collaborating.visual_cue: hands or bodies angled toward each other

user_analyzing_data.description: single figure examining charts or dashboard elements
user_analyzing_data.scene_focus: figure leaning toward a visible chart, magnifying glass, pointing gesture
user_analyzing_data.visual_cue: focused posture, clear sight line to data element

team_brainstorming.scene_focus: figures around table or board, sticky notes, light bulbs above heads
team_brainstorming.visual_cue: circular arrangement, raised arms or engaged postures

remote_meeting.description: figures in separate screen frames, connected visually
remote_meeting.scene_focus: video call windows or screen frames, figures visible in separate boxes
remote_meeting.visual_cue: frames or borders separating figures, connection lines

startup_workflow.description: figure moving through a process with clear steps
startup_workflow.scene_focus: figure at different stages of a visible process, step indicators or path
startup_workflow.visual_cue: forward momentum, ascending path, progress markers

learning_moment.description: figure receiving information from a visual element (book, screen, diagram)
learning_moment.scene_focus: figure interacting with book, screen, or diagram element
learning_moment.visual_cue: attention directed to learning source, curious posture

playful_tech.description: rounded shapes, brighter accents, warmer palette, slightly more expressive characters
playful_tech.shape_language: rounded corners, bouncy proportions, soft curves everywhere
playful_tech.character_style: expressive faces with simple emoji-like expressions, dynamic poses
playful_tech.background: light pastels or white with colorful geometric accents

serious_fintech.description: more angular shapes, muted palette, formal poses, minimal decoration
serious_fintech.shape_language: sharp corners, geometric precision, grid-aligned composition
serious_fintech.character_style: neutral expressions, professional postures, minimal details
serious_fintech.background: white or off-white, sparse accent colors

friendly_productivity.description: soft shapes, pastel accents, relaxed poses, warm background tints
friendly_productivity.shape_language: soft rounded forms, approachable proportions, organic asymmetry
friendly_productivity.character_style: content expressions, relaxed poses, warm gestures
friendly_productivity.background: light warm tint (cream, pale yellow) with subtle texture

educational_platform.description: clear hierarchical layout, warm inviting palette, explanatory compositions
educational_platform.shape_language: balanced geometric forms, clear visual hierarchy, consistent scale relationships
educational_platform.character_style: curious expressions, teaching poses, hands pointing or explaining
educational_platform.background: white with warm accent zones, emphasis through color zones
